title: Boulevard of Broken Dreams
meaning_summary: Its emotional directness and broad 2000s radio familiarity keep it commercially durable well beyond its original cycle.
revenue_drivers: Alternative and 2000s playlists sustain recurring replay.
Strong familiarity keeps the track visible to newer listeners.
Catalog depth and sync potential help extend earnings.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Boulevard of Broken Dreams is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
